title: Accessing gated page results in 'page doesn't exist' error
symptom: An admin user receives an error stating that the 'dashboard' page doesn't exist when trying to access it. Other non-gated pages are accessible without issues.
applies_when: User is logged in as an admin
Page is gated with authentication requirements
not_this_if: RLS is properly configured for roles
root_cause: The error occurs because the Row Level Security (RLS) settings for the roles table may not be configured correctly, preventing the system from recognizing the user's authentication status. Additionally, the setup of User Groups may require users to have all specified types associated with them.
fix_steps: Remove RLS for the roles table
Ensure User Groups are set up correctly to include all required user types
Test access to the gated page again
agent_instruction: Remove RLS for the roles table and verify User Group configurations.
